overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis (Night City from Cyberpunk 2077), featuring towering glass skyscrapers illuminated by vibrant neon advertisements, wet reflective streets, and moderate pedestrian activity. The camera moves steadily through urban canyons, crossing intersections and passing iconic digital billboards including a massive 'CIRUS COLA' advertisement.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk at night, flanked by towering glass office buildings and vertical digital billboards. The wet concrete reflects the neon glow of advertisements as the camera moves forward past a seated pedestrian, approaching a street intersection with palm trees visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions onto a wide intersection crosswalk beneath an elevated highway structure, surrounded by moderate crowds crossing the street. A black car waits at the red light on the left while digital billboards illuminate the scene, and the glass tower recedes into the background.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a wide urban plaza with crowds of pedestrians, crossing a broad yellow-striped crosswalk. The iconic CIRUS COLA billboard becomes visible in the distance alongside a striking yellow-lit geometric building, while the camera follows a small child in red across the intersection.

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, dominated by the massive CIRUS COLA billboard now filling the right side of the frame. The camera passes concrete barriers and approaches the striking yellow geometric building with its diamond-pattern lighting, while pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk district that transitions from a narrow sidewalk into a sprawling urban plaza. It begins on a wet concrete walkway flanked by towering glass office buildings, moving past a seated pedestrian toward a distant intersection lined with palm trees. As the camera enters a wide crosswalk beneath an elevated highway, the scene opens up to reveal moderate crowds and a waiting black car under the glow of digital billboards. The perspective then shifts into a broad plaza, following a small child in red across yellow-striped markings toward a striking yellow-lit geometric building and a distant advertisement. Finally, the camera glides beneath the highway structure as the massive CIRUS COLA billboard dominates the frame, passing concrete barriers to approach the diamond-pattern lighting of the yellow architecture.
